description.content: Authentication: register, login (device code flow), API key management
Regenerate API key. Old key is instantly revoked.
Return current user info with usage stats.
Update user settings. Currently supports memory_block_enabled.
Exchange a one-time session token for a JWT session.

Issue a fresh session JWT with a new 1-year expiry.

Requires a valid (non-expired) session token.
Reveal the full API key. Requires authentication (API key or session JWT).
Retrieve the current webhook signing secret.
Regenerate webhook signing secret. Old secret is instantly revoked.
CRUD operations for scheduled cues (tasks)
Manually fire a cue — creates an execution immediately regardless of schedule.
Execution management: outcomes, claimable list, claim for worker transport
List executions with optional filters.
List pending/retry-ready worker-transport executions available for claiming.
Get a single execution by ID.

Claim the next available worker-transport execution.

Picks the oldest pending execution belonging to the user's worker cues.
Uses conditional UPDATE WHERE status='pending' to prevent race conditions.
Returns 409 if no executions are available for claiming.
Worker sends heartbeat to extend claim lease during long-running jobs.

Claim a specific pending worker-transport execution for processing.

Uses conditional UPDATE WHERE status='pending' to prevent race conditions.
Returns 409 if already claimed or not eligible.
Replay an execution — creates a new execution with the same cue and payload.
Mark an execution outcome as verified.
Mark an execution outcome as pending verification.

Append evidence to an execution after outcome is already recorded.

Unlike POST /outcome (write-once), this endpoint allows adding evidence
fields without changing the outcome success/failure status. This is
essential for worker transport where the daemon auto-reports outcome
before the agent has finished producing business results.
Worker transport: heartbeat registration for pull-based execution delivery
UPSERT worker: insert or update on (user_id, worker_id) conflict.
List all registered workers with heartbeat status.
Delete a registered worker. Only the owning user can delete their workers.
Usage stats and plan information
Stripe billing: checkout, portal, webhooks
Echo endpoint for testing webhook delivery
Store a payload keyed by token. No auth required. Expires after 5 minutes.
Retrieve a stored payload. Auth required.
Blog content: public read-only articles, RSS feed, auth-protected CRUD
List all published blog posts. Filterable by category.

query.description: Filter by category: tutorial, guide, blog

description.content: Create a new blog post (auth required).
Get a single published blog post by slug.
Update a blog post by slug (auth required).
Delete a blog post by slug (auth required).
RSS 2.0 feed of published blog posts.
Serve a generated blog hero image from the database. Public, no auth.
HTML pages for device code verification flow

Lightweight status endpoint for uptime monitors.
Returns healthy/degraded/down with HTTP 200 or 503.

Request account deletion with 24-hour grace period.

Requires X-Confirm-Destructive: true header.
Sends confirmation email with cancellation link.
Returns 202 Accepted.

Cancel a pending account deletion using the confirmation token.

Accepts token either from JSON body or query parameter.
Does not require auth (user may have rotated their key).

Export all personal data as a JSON file (GDPR Article 20).

Rate limited to 1 request per hour per user.
Returns a streaming JSON response with Content-Disposition attachment.

Return what personal data we process, why, and user rights (GDPR Article 15).

Serves structured JSON describing all data categories, purposes,
lawful bases, retention periods, sub-processors, and available rights.
Generated from app/gdpr/processing_info.json for easy maintenance.
Submit a support request. Stores in database and sends internal notification via Resend.
List all support tickets for the authenticated user. Paginated.
Get a support ticket by ID. Users can only see their own tickets.
Return agent memory block text. Requires user consent (memory_block_enabled).
Subscribe to memory block update notifications.
Unsubscribe from memory block updates.
Publish a new memory block version and notify subscribers. Internal only.
Internal endpoint triggered by Railway deploy to create an Argus test cue.
Run a content pipeline step. Protected by X-Pipeline-Secret header.
Run the daily release audit. Protected by X-Pipeline-Secret header.

Official Postman collection for CueAPI — the open-source execution accountability primitive for AI agents. Schedule agent work on a cue, require evidence-backed outcome reports, and gate execution with write-once verification.

## Authentication

All endpoints require a Bearer token. Set the `apiKey` collection variable to your CueAPI API key (generate at https://cueapi.ai).

## Base URL

`https://api.cueapi.ai` (hosted) — override the `baseUrl` variable for self-hosted instances.

## Links

- **Homepage:** https://cueapi.ai
- **Docs:** https://docs.cueapi.ai
- **Status:** https://status.cueapi.ai
- **Core (open source):** https://github.com/cueapi/cueapi-core
